heading: About Angie Barton
bio:
Angie is a dedicated accounting professional with extensive experience in bookkeeping, accounting, and tax preparation for individuals and businesses.

Founded on the belief that every client deserves professional, personalized financial guidance, ABPS has been proudly serving our local community with integrity and care.

Angie works closely with each client to understand their unique situation and goals, providing tailored solutions that make financial management straightforward and stress-free. Whether you are an individual navigating tax season, a small business owner managing the books, or a corporation in need of reliable financial reporting, ABPS is here to help.
credentials: Experienced in personal and corporate tax preparation
Knowledgeable in Canadian tax law and CRA requirements
Serving individuals, businesses, and non-profit organizations
Committed to accuracy, confidentiality, and personal service

values.title: Accuracy
values.description: Meticulous attention to detail in everything we do, so you can have complete confidence in your financials.

values.title: Confidentiality
values.description: Your financial information is handled with the utmost discretion and professionalism at all times.

values.title: Personal Service
values.description: You work directly with Angie, not a large firm. Every client receives attentive, individualized care.
